prompt.content:
In the DCF model, please make the following changes:

•	Update the risk-free rate for S&P Global, S&P Mobility, and RemainCo to be the 10 year treasury rate on Jan 2, 2026.
•	Change the Allocation % for S&P Mobility and RemainCo to be on the basis of Segment operating profit. Return the updated values for each as percents.
•	Change the 2030 Ratings Revenue % Growth so that the model achieves an average 2025-2030 Total Revenue CAGR of 8.0% for RemainCo. Return the 2030 % growth as a percent to two decimal places.

Provide the updated Shareholder Equity Value Creation - $ in millions, rounded to zero decimals.

messages.content: States the 2030 Ratings Revenue % Growth is 11.52% (acceptable range 11.40% to 11.64%).

rubrics.name: States the allocation % for S&P Mobility is 94% (acceptable range 93% to 95%) (ver_6dac15d4dc7740a781d31e24fb7390ee)

messages.content: States the allocation % for RemainCo is 6% (acceptable range 5.9% to 6.1%).
